text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, June 22. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Researching rover power systems in depth. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. I can help troubleshoot that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
